Text: Skyblight
Hazardous weather: The air itself conspires against you! See Skyblight and Badrain modifiers for effects.
All water get contaminated over time. Does not affect waters in storage (Tanks).
Blight Strength

How fast the blight spreads into the water (%/hour).
For example, at default 10%/hour, if you have 1m³ of water at 40% contamination, after an hour, it will be 50% contaminated.
Badrain

Contaminated rain that causes various (configurable) negative effects:
- Limit the moisture range of your land.
- Contaminate the land every now and then.
- Beavers get sick if outside for too long every day.
- Bots get damaged when outside.
Limit Moisture Range
Limit the range your land get moisture when badrain is active.
Limited Moisture Range
The maximum moisture range when badrain is active.
Frequent land contamination
Contaminate the land every now and then when badrain is active.
Contamination Duration
How long the land is contaminated (hours) when badrain is active.
Clear Duration
How long the land is clear of contamination (hours) when badrain is active.
Cause sick beavers
Beavers get sick if outside for too long when badrain is active.
Minimum Time Outside
Minimum time outside (hours) before it risks getting sick.
Maximum Time Outside
Maximum time outside (hours) at which a beaver will surely get sick. Between minimum and maximum time, the chance to get sick increases linearly.
Damage bots
Bots get damaged when outside while badrain is active.
Bot Damage (%/hour)
How much damage bots get per hour outside when badrain is active.
This Bot is in Badrain. It is being damaged at {0:0%} per hour while outside.
